description: Evals for the claude-codex plugin. Tests cover the classify.sh routing script and the /codex command behavior.

evals.name: classify-bare-format
evals.prompt: Run the classify.sh script with the single-word prompt 'format' and report the full output line.
evals.expected_output: DELEGATE:format:<score> — the decision must be DELEGATE with category 'format'. Before the fix, this returned UNSURE or CLAUDE because the pattern required a trailing space.

evals.name: classify-code-generation
evals.prompt: Run the classify.sh script with the prompt 'write a getUser function that fetches a user by ID from the database' and report the full output line.
evals.expected_output: DELEGATE:code-generator:<score> — code generation tasks should delegate.
evals.test_command: bash /Users/jat406/GitHub/claude-codex/scripts/classify.sh 'write a getUser function that fetches a user by ID from the database'

evals.name: classify-why-question-stays-claude
evals.prompt: Run the classify.sh script with the prompt 'why does my app crash when I call getUserById with null' and report the full output line.
evals.expected_output: CLAUDE:reasoning-question or debugging-task:<score> — 'why' questions and debugging must stay with Claude.
evals.test_command: bash /Users/jat406/GitHub/claude-codex/scripts/classify.sh 'why does my app crash when I call getUserById with null'

evals.name: classify-test-writing
evals.prompt: Run the classify.sh script with the prompt 'write unit tests for the getUserById function' and report the full output line.
evals.expected_output: DELEGATE:test-writer:<score> — test writing should delegate with test-writer category.
evals.test_command: bash /Users/jat406/GitHub/claude-codex/scripts/classify.sh 'write unit tests for the getUserById function'

evals.name: classify-lint-bare
evals.prompt: Run the classify.sh script with the single-word prompt 'lint' and report the full output line.
evals.expected_output: DELEGATE:format:<score> — bare 'lint' should delegate like bare 'format'.
